name: loading_icon
description: A single plump ball of yarn, bright teal with visible chunky wound strands and a short trailing thread, centered, reads instantly as a spinner icon.
prompt_extra: radially symmetric enough to rotate without wobble; no text

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
